IF DANIEL GETS ROOM MATES HE SHALL PAY FOR CREDIT CHECKS ETC AND GET APPROVAL OF LANDLORD FIRST. PLNTF CAN INSPECT PREMISES W/IN 30 DAYS AND IF DAMAGE EXISTS (LESS THAN $5000) HE CAN GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT. INSPECTION TO BE AT MUTUALLY AGREED TIME. THIS IS ENTIRE AGREEMENT. SC602 JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, REPORTER RHONDA FUNG, CLERK IRIS HAMMER
